PD'S MOT TO CONTINE PX FILED

/X COURT RECEIVES A NEGATIVE BOT REPORT,/SHER/BAIL 45,000/X MATTER IS RECLLED IN THE AFTERNOON,/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEAOF G/DEFT ADV RTS:1/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:01-12-09/SA2:15TH AND MINNA STREET, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD/

/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/OR/DEF:ORDEREDTO REPORT TO ORPJ THREE TIMES A WEEK AND NOT TO UNLAWFULLY  POSSESS ANY CONTROLLED SUBSTANCE/NTW/X:DEFENDANT PERSONALLY WAIVES RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE HEARD WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS, BUT DOES NOT WAIVE RIGHT TO A PRELIMINARY HEARING TO BE COMPLETED WITHIN 60 CALENDAR DAYS,/LD:11-10-08/987,2/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
